ground_truth.title: The 9 Best Event Planning Companies in Seattle
ground_truth.main_content:
During tours, couples commonly ask the team at THE 101 if they need to hire a wedding planner. Companies who are planning a large-scale event ask the same question.

Our answer will always be yes.

We strongly recommend hiring an event planner — for weddings, corporate events, or even private parties. Even if you don’t choose THE 101 Planning, that’s OK, and here’s why: Planning your event is extremely time-consuming. When you have professional help with the planning and event design, things tend to run much smoother throughout the planning process, as well as on the day of the big event. 

THE 101’s planning team is available to work at THE 101, as well as any venue in the Seattle, WA area, but we understand we’re not the right fit for every couple. There are plenty of talented event planners in Seattle who offer both wedding and corporate event planning, so we’ve curated a list of some of the top options. 

Hallea Events

Hallea Events stands out for their meticulous attention to detail and personalized approach to every event, ensuring that each wedding reflects the unique style and vision of the couple. With a keen eye for design and a passion for creating unforgettable experiences, Hallea Events is a company specializing in weddings that are both timeless and breathtaking.

Events with Jojo

Infusing each celebration with creativity and flair, Events with Jojo brings a fresh and innovative perspective to Seattle events. Whether you’re planning a traditional or modern wedding, their team will seamlessly blend every aspect to create the perfect event. Events with Jojo specializes in crafting weddings that are as unique as the couples themselves, leaving guests awe-inspired and delighted.

THE 101 Planning

THE 101 offers a variety of planning packages, all including day-of event management, to cater to your wedding needs.

Ranging from month-of coordination to full service event planning, we’ve got a team of the best Seattle wedding planners available to curate the seamless day of your dreams.

Whether you’re getting married at THE 101 or another venue in the Seattle area, our team will help you connect with our trusted vendor partners, expertly craft a flawless timeline, and so much more. Wedding and event planning is our specialty, from the design and décor to the day-of execution, THE 101 Planning has every detail covered.

Jubilee Weddings & Events

Jubilee Weddings & Events creates joyous and memorable weddings filled with warmth. Their commitment to personalized event production and genuine care for their clients ensures that every detail is flawlessly executed, allowing couples to enjoy their event experience knowing that they are in very capable hands.

Something Blue Productions

Something Blue Productions offers impeccable organization and seamless coordination for events in Seattle. With a keen understanding of their client’s desires, they bring dreams to life with creativity and precision, and plan events that are both elegant and unforgettable.

Events with Alice

Bringing a warm and attentive approach to the planning process, Alice specializes in creating intimate and personalized weddings that reflect the unique love stories of each couple. Alice guides clients with grace and expertise, transforming what they envision into reality while fostering a sense of joy and ease.

Cottrell & Co. Events

Renowned for their sophisticated aesthetic and unparalleled attention to detail, Cottrell & Co. Events takes pride in elevating weddings to extraordinary heights. With a passion for storytelling and a flair for design, this full-service team curates immersive experiences to captivate the senses and leave a lasting impression on guests.

The Social Co.

The Social Co. brings a fresh and modern perspective to wedding planning, infusing each celebration with style and personality. With a focus on creativity and innovation, this event production company tailors their services to reflect the individuality of each couple, creating high-impact, boutique weddings.

Sinclair & Moore

Sinclair & Moore is synonymous with luxury and refinement, renowned for their exquisite floral designs and opulent décor. With an unparalleled eye for beauty and a commitment to excellence, having Sinclair & Moore as your event planning partner will ensure memorable experiences for everyone involved. This rock star planning team transforms venues into enchanting wonderland with their expert event knowledge.

Start Planning Your Event Today

When it comes to finding the top event planners near Seattle, this list is a trusted place to start. The expert team at THE 101 Planning will provide the support you need, and has got you covered to ensure a momentous occasion. Reach out to our talented team of wedding planners today.
